name: AMNIOTIC FLUID VOLUME
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF OBSTETRIC AND GYNECOLOGIC
definition: amniotic fluid volume > 1,500-2,000 cm3 at term amniotic fluid volume < 500 cm3 at term
dominant_finding: single largest pocket devoid of fetal parts / cord > 8 cm in vertical direction
discriminating_features: fetus does not fill the AP diameter of uterus
single largest pocket devoid of fetal parts / cord > 8 cm in vertical direction
single largest pocket devoid of fetal parts / cord ≤ 1-2 cm in vertical direction

general: fetus does not fill the AP diameter of uterus
single largest pocket devoid of fetal parts / cord > 8 cm in vertical direction
single largest pocket devoid of fetal parts / cord ≤ 1-2 cm in vertical direction
